task: Find the shipping cost of a Common medium-sized box in flat-rate shipping and compare it with other parcel services.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the information-finding task. It navigated to the official UPS flat-rate shipping page on ups.com and verified the Medium UPS Simple Rate tab showing 'Medium: Starting at $18.95' with common medium box dimensions (8x8x8, 12x9x6, 13x11x2). It then gathered comparison prices from official USPS and FedEx sources: USPS Priority Mail Medium Flat Rate Box at $21.17 commercial / $24.80 retail, and FedEx One Rate Medium Box at $24.35. The final comparison accurately reflects the evidence shown in the trajectory and answers the user's request to find the shipping cost of a common medium-sized flat-rate box and compare it with other parcel services.
final_result_response:
I re-checked the UPS flat-rate page and confirmed the Medium tab.

| Service | Comparable flat-rate option | Price | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| **UPS Simple Rate** | Medium, 251-650 cu in | **Starts at $18.95** | Common sizes: 8x8x8, 12x9x6, 13x11x2. UPS lets you choose delivery speed from ground to next-day. <citation refs="search_87369afcbb574edeafaff5e957480fd8#1">UPS lists “Medium: Starting at $18.95” and “Dimensions: 251-650 cubic inches,” with common box dimensions including “8 in x 8 in x 8 in, 12 in x 9 in x 6 in, 13 in x 11 in x 2 in.”</citation> |
| **USPS Priority Mail Flat Rate** | Medium Flat Rate Box | **$21.17 commercial / $24.80 retail** | 2-3 day Priority Mail, up to 70 lb. <citation refs="search_f48e63d7ded54138a38ddc4dd4cce30c#1">USPS lists “Medium Flat Rate Box” at “$21.17 Commercial Pricing” and “$24.80 at Post Office,” and says Priority Mail Flat Rate ships packages up to 70 lbs.</citation> |
| **FedEx One Rate** | FedEx Medium Box | **$24.35** | FedEx 2Day flat-rate price, up to 50 lb. <citation refs="search_c628b6242884479399648c5642c5f58f#1">FedEx lists the “FedEx Medium Box” with “FedEx 2Day flat rates” of “$24.35.”</citation> |

**Bottom line:** UPS is the cheapest starting flat-rate option for a medium box at **$18.95**, about **$2.22 less than USPS commercial**, **$5.85 less than USPS retail**, and **$5.40 less than FedEx One Rate**. The caveat is that UPS’s $18.95 is the starting rate, likely the slower option, while USPS and FedEx comparisons are faster 2-3 day style services.
action_history: Opening UPS flat-rate page: const upsPage1 = await openTab('https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-costs-rates/flat-rate-shipping');
Viewing UPS medium flat-rate details: await page.locator('e18').click();
Inspecting UPS rates page links: const upsRatesPage2 = await openTab('https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/shipping-support/shipping-costs-rates.page');
Opening UPS daily rates guide: await page.locator('e20').click();
Confirming UPS medium tab pricing: await page.locator('e22').click();
